\[

\[
\text{Area of } \triangle ACD = \frac{1}{2} \cdot CD \cdot h = \frac{1}{2} \cdot 12 \cdot h = 6h

\[

\]

We are asked to find the ratio of the area of triangle $ACB$ to the area of trapezoid $ABCD$:
\[
\frac{\text{Area of } \triangle ACB}{\text{Area of } ABCD} = \frac{10h}{16h} = \frac{10}{16} = \frac{5}{8}
\]

Thus, the ratio of the area of triangle $ACB$ to the area of trapezoid $ABCD$ is $\frac{5}{8}$.
